author: Rachel Morris
body: Oh. My. Goodness. What did I just witness?! :D I hadn’t seen this… I’m still shaking my head at how ridiculously awesome they are. As always, thanks for posting Burgo.

author: Burgo
body: As always Rachel, thanks for the comment :)

author: Masey
body:
Bon’s one of a kind – no doubt.

Did you ever see the wicked LIVE and definitely unplugged performance of “Dance, Dance, Dance” he did in LA with Lykke Li? Super fun track:

[http://www.vimeo.com/1857259](http://www.vimeo.com/1857259)

author: Edward Harran
body:
Thanks Burgo.

Awesome Live, as expected.

I actually think I like their new album more than the first one. Big call yes, but obsessed with Towers right now
